sys_ui_message.key: Platform Toast A Subtask has a Suspense Date After the Suspense Date on this Task
sys_ui_message.message:
At least one (1) immediate Subtask in your Task Tree has a Suspense Date AFTER the Suspense Date on this task.
To adjust the Suspense Dates on immediate Subtasks:
1) Navigate to the Tasks tab
2) On the Suspense Date column, double-click on the date and select a new date
3) Click the green checkbox to Save the updates.
sys_ui_message.sys_name: Platform Toast A Subtask has a Suspense Date After the Suspense Date on this Task
